extraSources.name: Study in Korea (Government scholarship & admissions portal)

requirements.label: Certificate of Admission
requirements.detail: A certificate of admission from a Korean university authorised to enrol international (D-2) students.

requirements.label: Financial requirement
requirements.detail: Show about ₩20,000,000 (roughly USD 15,000) held in a bank account for at least 28 days before applying.

requirements.label: National Health Insurance (NHIS)
requirements.detail: International students enrol in Korea's National Health Insurance after arrival.

requirements.label: Language proof
requirements.detail: TOPIK for Korean-taught programmes, or IELTS/TOEFL for English-taught.

requirements.label: Valid passport
requirements.detail: A passport valid for your intended stay.

requirements.label: Tuition / funds transfer
requirements.detail: Transfer fees or living funds with a low-FX provider.

requirements.label: Connectivity on arrival
requirements.detail: An eSIM gives you a Korean number and data on landing.

requirements.label: Accommodation
requirements.detail: Arrange a dorm or housing early, especially in Seoul.
